workers_and_pages.cli.title: Create with CLI
workers_and_pages.cli.description: Create, preview, and deploy your Workers & Pages from a command line interface (CLI). Use this guide to set up your development environment.
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.1.title: Create a new application with C3
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.1.descriptio: C3 (create-cloudflare-cli) is a command-line tool designed to help you set up and deploy Workers & Pages applications to Cloudflare as fast as possible. To get started, open a terminal window and run:
This will prompt you to install the <0>create-cloudflare package</0> and lead you through a setup wizard.

Once your Worker or Pages application has been created, you will be asked if you would like to deploy the application to Cloudflare. From here you can either deploy and view your application, or navigate to the application folder to begin development using Wrangler.
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.2.title: Develop with Wrangler
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.2.descriptio: The Workers & Pages command-line interface, Wrangler, allows you to test and deploy your applications. Applications created via C3 will have Wrangler installed as a dependency by default, meaning once you have navigated to the application folder you can immediately start developing with Wrangler.
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.2a.title: Preview and test your application
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.2a.descripti: To start a local server for developing your Worker, run:
To start a local server for developing your Pages application, run:
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.2b.title: Deploy your application
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.2b.descripti: To deploy a Pages application, publish a folder of static assets as a new deployment. This will automatically pull in git information if available.
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.2c.title: Explore Wrangler's commands
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.2c.descripti: To see a list of Wrangler commands along with descriptions for each of them run:
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.done.title: That’s it!
workers_and_pages.cli.steps.done.descrip: To support you along your journey developing with Workers & Pages here are some resources:
Have questions? Need help? Want to show off what you're building? Join our Cloudflare Developer community on <0>Discord</0>.

workers_and_pages.failure_mode.info: On the Free plan, you are limited to a total of 100,000 Worker requests per day. When that limit is exceeded, requests to your routes will fail unless the failure mode is set to "fail open". <0>Upgrade your plan</0> to enable pay-per-use billing.

workers_and_pages.failure_mode.closed.de: Additional requests will return an error page to your users. We recommend this option if your Worker does security checks.

workers_and_pages.binding_type.ai.descri: Run machine learning models globally, powered by serverless GPUs
workers_and_pages.binding_type.ai.toolti: Add generative AI, automatic speech recognition, image and text classification, object detection, summarization, and translation with a single binding.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.analytics: Send unlimited-cardinality data to a queryable time-series database
Send unlimited-cardinality data to a queryable time-series database
Write custom analytics from your Worker to build solutions like observability into your Worker, expose analytics to customers, or build usage-based billing systems.
Write custom analytics from your Pages Functions to build solutions like observability into your project, expose analytics to customers, or build usage-based billing systems.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.assets.de: Access static assets from your Worker
workers_and_pages.binding_type.assets.to: Access assets directly from your Worker script.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.browser.d: Programmatically control a headless browser instance
workers_and_pages.binding_type.browser.t: Control and interact with a headless browser instance and create automation flows for your  applications and products.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.d1.descri: Store relational data with serverless SQL database
workers_and_pages.binding_type.d1.toolti: D1 is Cloudflare’s native serverless database enabling you to build applications that handle large amounts of users at no extra cost.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.dispatch_: Deploy custom code on behalf of users using Workers for Platforms

Workers for Platforms extends the capabilities of Cloudflare Workers to SaaS businesses that want to deploy Worker scripts on behalf of their customers or let their users write Worker scripts directly.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.durable_o: Build real-time coordination with stateful compute
A globally distributed coordination API with strongly consistent storage, enabling powerful coordination among multiple clients or users with private, transactional, and consistent storage.
Evaluate feature flags from a Flagship app directly in your Worker
The binding connects your Worker directly to Cloudflare Flagship. Evaluate boolean, string, number, and object flags at the edge with an optional targeting context for rollouts and segmentation.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.hyperdriv: Connect to SQL databases with connection pooling and query caching

Turn your existing regional database into a globally distributed database. Hyperdrive is a service that accelerates queries you make to existing databases, making it faster to access your data from across the globe, irrespective of your users’ location.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.kv_namesp: Create a global, low-latency, key-value data storage

A low-latency, high-throughput global data store perfect for configuration data, routing data, A/B testing configurations, and authentication tokens. Workers KV is best suited for read-heavy workloads.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.media.too: Optimize and manipulate videos stored outside of Cloudflare Stream. Convert, resize, crop videos and extract still images or audio on our global network.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.stream.to: Upload content to Stream, provision direct uploads, manage videos, and generate signed URLs from a Worker.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.worker_lo: Load Workers containing arbitrary code at runtime
A lightweight, sandboxed environment for executing code, with millisecond cold starts, strict isolation, and the ability to restrict network access.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.mtls_cert: Communicate with target servers that require client authentication
Present a client certificate when communicating with target services that require client authentication.
Ingest, transform & store real time data streams
Ingest, transform & store real time events to destinations, like R2.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.queue.des: Reliably send and receive messages globally from your Worker
Reliably send and receive messages globally from your Pages Functions
workers_and_pages.binding_type.queue.too: Send and receive messages with guaranteed delivery and no charges for egress bandwidth.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.r2_bucket: Connect to your R2 object storage bucket to access its data
With zero egress fee, R2 gives you the freedom to create the multi-cloud architectures you desire with an S3-compatible object storage.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.ratelimit: Define and enforce rate limits in your Worker
Enforce rate limits on specific code blocks, user types, resources, or any combination of those within your Worker code.
workers_and_pages.binding.ratelimit.name: A positive integer ID for this rate limiter - e.g. 999
workers_and_pages.binding.ratelimit.limi: Maximum number of requests per period
workers_and_pages.binding_type.secrets_s: Access encrypted data from this account's secrets store.
Choose an Account Secret to bind to this Worker

workers_and_pages.binding_type.service.d: Enable Worker-to-Worker communication with no added latency
Enable communication between your Pages Functions and other Workers with no added latency
workers_and_pages.binding_type.service.t: Zero latency communication between Workers, enabling separation of concerns and isolated deployments without overhead.
Zero latency communication between your Pages Functions and other Workers, enabling separation of concerns and isolated deployments without overhead.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.vpc_servi: Connect your Worker to a private network service
VPC Service bindings let Workers reach private services through Cloudflare Workers VPC.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.vpc_netwo: Connect your Worker to a private network
VPC Network bindings let Workers reach private networks through Cloudflare Workers VPC.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.vectorize: Store and query vector data with our globally distributed vector database
Vectorize is a globally distributed vector database that enables you to build full-stack, AI-powered applications with Cloudflare Workers.
Vectorize is a globally distributed vector database that enables you to build full-stack, AI-powered applications with Cloudflare.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.ai_search: Search and manage AI Search instances within a namespace from your Worker
AI Search namespace bindings give your Worker access to all instances within a namespace, enabling dynamic instance management, search, and chat at runtime.
Bind directly to a single AI Search instance for search and chat
AI Search instance bindings connect your Worker directly to a single AI Search instance for search and chat completions.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.version_m: Expose metadata about your Worker (eg. versionId)
Access metadata associated with a version from inside the Workers runtime.
Build durable multi-step application on Workers
Add ability to build and execute applications that are durable in the face of errors, network issues, upstream API outages, rate limits, and infrastructure failure.
workers_and_pages.binding_type.send_emai: Process and send emails programmatically with Email Workers
Create custom logic to process, forward, and send emails using Email Workers and the send_email binding.
